ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot expressing affection or excitement represented by the beating heart emoji. The animation will focus on a gentle, rhythmic movement of both arms, mimicking the gentle rise and fall of a heartbeat. The arms will move in a synchronized, wave-like motion, conveying a sense of warmth and affection.  The movements will be subtle and not overly dramatic to maintain a gentle and tender feel.  I will use the examples provided as a guide to ensure the movements are fluid and expressive within the robot's physical constraints.

frames.beat: arms gently pulse outwards from the chest
a slight lift and outward push, like a soft beat
arms return to the center, a gentle pause
arms fall slightly, a fading echo of the warmth
